items.title: CVE-2026-54006
items.summary: CVE-2026-54006 is a broken access control vulnerability in Open WebUI versions prior to 0.9.6. The event update endpoint validates write access to the source calendar but fails to verify authorization for the destination calendar_id in the request body, allowing a regular user to move an event into any other user's calendar if they know its ID. The issue is fixed in version 0.9.6.
